name: Cul-de-sac at East end of Hickory
description: I'm in a Cul-de-sac at East end of Hickory
hints: A cul-de-sac at the east end of Hickory with a large house.
GO HOUSE to enter the large house. It may contain useful items or information.
GO HOUSE enters the large house. WEST returns to Hickory Ave (room 6). The house has multiple rooms to explore.
notes: East end cul-de-sac on Hickory Ave. GO HOUSE enters the large house (which has a garage, room 26). WEST returns to Hickory Ave (room 6).
